chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S- 471 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hearing of main case 24-07-2023 Mr. Faraz Hussain Shah, Advocate for the applicant. Mrs. Shabana Naheed, APG. ******** Counsel for the applicant admits the fact that order dated 15.06.2023 was passed by this Court in Const. Petition No.S-123 of 2023, vide which the detenue was delivered after recording her statement. Accordingly, the applicant may exhaust remedy available to him before the Family Court as there is no unlawful detention of the detenue being her custody was delivered to her parents by this Court by lawful orders. In view of above, instant Crl. Misc. Application stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
